user_request: Summarize the key findings from the Q2 performance report

messages.content: Summarize the key findings from the Q2 performance report

I think the company should focus more on customer retention rather than acquisition. The market is becoming increasingly competitive and many companies in this space are struggling with churn. It would be wise to invest in loyalty programs and improve the onboarding experience. Additionally, expanding into adjacent markets could provide new revenue streams.

tool_calls.outputs: Q2 Performance: Revenue $12.3M (+15% QoQ). Churn rate 4.2% (down from 5.1%). NPS 72. Top finding: expansion revenue exceeded new business for first time.

findings.span_text: I think the company should focus more on customer retention
findings.explanation: User asked for a summary of findings. Agent gave unsolicited strategic opinions instead of reporting what the report actually said.
findings.evidence_proving_hallucination: Tool output contains specific findings that were not relayed.
